breakdown: PR #6409 adds a single test file for a new loc.sh script with comprehensive test coverage for directory space handling and boundary-aware test detection. Naming is clear (test_loc_script.py, _write_file, LOC_SCRIPT, PROJECT_ROOT). Error handling properly uses check=False with manual returncode validation. Type safety strong with Path typing throughout. Architecture shows proper separation (script in scripts/, tests in tests/scripts/). Test coverage is thorough covering multiple scenarios. Documentation weak with missing docstrings on test functions (only inline comment explaining subprocess execution).
key_changes: Added tests/scripts/test_loc_script.py - tests for loc.sh script
Test handles directories with spaces in names
Tests validate output formatting with emoji indicators and SUBTOTAL lines
No source code changes shown - this appears to be a test-only PR for a new script
